name: Sophos Endpoint Protection
description: This app supports various investigative and containment actions on Sophos Endpoint Protection

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: List all the endpoints/sensors configured on the device

parameters.name: page_from_key
parameters.description: The key of the item from where to fetch a page

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The size of the page requested

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Define how to sort the data (comma separated)

parameters.name: health_status
parameters.description: Get endpoints having any of the specified health status (comma separated)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Get endpoints having any of the specified endpoint type (comma separated)

parameters.name: tamper_protection_enabled
parameters.description: Tamper protection status

parameters.name: lockdown_status
parameters.description: Get endpoints having any of the specified lockdown statuses (comma separated)

parameters.name: last_seen_before
parameters.description: Last seen after date and time (UTC) or duration inclusive

parameters.name: last_seen_after
parameters.description: Last seen before date and time (UTC) or duration exclusive

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Get endpoints having any of the specified ids (comma separated)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: The fields to return in a partial response

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Type of view to be returned in response

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Term to search for in the specified search fields

parameters.name: search_fields
parameters.description: List of search fields for finding the given search term (comma separated). Defaults to all applicable fields

actions.name: Check Updates
actions.description: Send a request to the endpoint to check for Sophos management agent software updates

parameters.name: endpointid
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

actions.name: Tamper Protection Switch
actions.description: Turn Tamper Protection on or off on the endpoint

parameters.name: endpointid
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether Tamper Protection should be turned on for the endpoint

parameters.name: regenerate_password
parameters.description: Whether a new Tamper Protection password should be generated

actions.name: Get Tamperprotection Settings
actions.description: Get the Tamper Protection settings for the specified endpoint

parameters.name: endpointid
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

actions.name: Perform Scan
actions.description: Send a request to the specified endpoint to perform or configure a scan

parameters.name: endpointid
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

parameters.name: endpointid
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

actions.name: Get Individual Endpoint
actions.description: Get the endpoint based on ID

parameters.name: endpointid
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: The fields to return in a partial response

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Type of view to be returned in response

actions.name: List Items
actions.description: Get all allowed or blocked items

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to fetch, starting with 1

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The size of the page requested

parameters.name: items_type
parameters.description: Specifies the type of items to be fetched: blocked or allowed

actions.name: Delete Item
actions.description: Delete the specified blocked or allowed item

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The item ID to be deleted

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Specifies the type of item to be deleted: blocked or allowed

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The file name

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path for the application

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: The SHA256 value for the application

parameters.name: certificate_signer
parameters.description: The value saved for the certificate signer

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment indicating why the item should be blocked

parameters.name: property_type
parameters.description: Specifies the property by which an item is allowed: path, sha256 or certificateSigner

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The file name

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path for the application

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: The SHA256 value for the application

parameters.name: certificate_signer
parameters.description: The value saved for the certificate signer

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment indicating why the item should be allowed

parameters.name: origin_person_id
parameters.description: Person associated with the endpoint where the item to be allowed was last seen

parameters.name: origin_endpoint_id
parameters.description: Endpoint where the item to be allowed was last seen

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to fetch, starting with 1

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The size of the page requested

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: The local site ID

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The category Id associated with this local site

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: An array of tags associated with this local site setting (comma separated)

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Local site URL

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment indicating why the site should be added

actions.name: Get Isolation Settings
actions.description: Get isolation settings for an endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The endpoint ID

actions.name: Isolation Switch
actions.description: Turn on or off endpoint isolation for multiple endpoints

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of endpoint IDs (comma separated)

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether the endpoints should be isolated

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Reason the endpoints should be isolated
